RIVER BEND GOLF COURSE HAD 3 INCHES OF RAIN WHICH RESULTED IN THE FAILURE OF A DAM THAT HOLDS ONE OF THE PONDS ON THE GOLF COURSE. THE WATER FLOWED INTO THE NEXT POND AT THE GOLF COURSE. NOBODY WAS AROUND WHEN THIS HAPPENED SO THE TIME IS ESTIMATED BASED ON WHEN RAIN ENDED AND RUNOFF LEAD TO A DAM BREACH. GOLF COURSE EMPLOYEE SAID DAM BREACHES ON THEIR COURSE ARE QUITE RARE. ALSO A TREE ON THE COURSE FELL OVER APPARENTLY DUE TO THE WET SOIL.
